en: All right, all right, all right!
I don't even know if that's for everyone.
What do you think she's into? Cats? Night?
ko: 쟤가 뭘 좋아할 것 같아? 고양이? 밤?

en: Does she have like some upper lip hair?
I don't know, great thing for that.
You saw a dragon.
Oh no, now I'm delayed.
You know your job is a jar...
Mm-hmm. You know your job is a jar...
I can talk. You know your jar...
Why can't I say this line?
She took her jam piece.
Can you guys hear, there's a bird that's so loud.
I'm trying to sort of time the lines in between the chirping.
Sorry, my cat walked in here.
This is not a kitty-tet, come on.
ko: 여긴 고양이 모임이 아니야, 이리 와.

en: Take that, smelly cat.
I feel like I need to like snarl like a cat in one of these.
ko: 이 중 하나에서 고양이처럼 으르렁거려야 할 것 같아.

en: Take that, smelly cat!
Is that not what a cat sounds like?
Oh my gosh, spit everywhere.
Ba-ba, mountain gas!
Yep!
